sdk.name: prompt-to-binary-sdk
sdk.contract: stable request/result/provenance surface for swarm plan submission

framework.name: prompt-to-binary-framework
framework.contract: adoption layer — scaffold + verify. swarm plans are requirements, run requests are source, preflight checks are verification gates

repo.boundary: Swarm orchestration for GPU-backed agent bursts. SDK, not artifact generator.
